untranslatable_reason: DBW pattern detection requires candlestick pattern recognition (identification of descending broadening wedge formation with expanding highs and lows). This is not available in the allowed indicators list which only includes price levels, moving averages, oscillators, and volatility measures. The signal also requires regime classification (BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET) which is not in ALLOWED_REGIMES. Market regime must use TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, or ANY. Measure rule targets (top of pattern, height calculations) require pattern-specific price levels not derivable from standard indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used volume conditions (heavy vs light breakout volume) with Donchian Channel extremes as pattern boundaries, but this does not capture the actual DBW pattern geometry or the bull/bear market regime context specified in the original signal. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside the standard indicator framework.
